web.markdown:
## La Baia North Bay Harbor Islands

## La Baia North Bay Harbor Islands

## 57 Waterfront Miami Condos with Resort-Style Amenities

Now under construction and developed by Continuum Company, La Baia North Bay Harbor Islands is a brand-new luxury waterfront condominium with resort-style amenities and private boat slips in Miami’s exclusive Bay Harbor Islands.

La Baia North Bay Harbor Islands features expansive 2- to 4-bedroom residences with dramatic waterfront and Miami skyline views. Residents will enjoy access to over 20,000 square feet of amenities, five-star services, and yacht club access.

[discover the residences](https://labaiabayharbor.com/residences/)

80

###### Remaining Available Residences

80
K

###### Square Feet of Amenities

80

###### Q1 Est. Completion

##### Amenities for Everyone

La Baia offers an unmatched Bay Harbor Islands lifestyle - for all ages.

##### waterfront living

In addition to La Baia North's private boat slips, residents will also enjoy a private yacht club membership.

##### In the middle of it all

Less than a mile from Bal Harbour, Surfside, and the nearest beach, Bay Harbor Islands is just a short drive from Brickell, Downtown Miami, along with the MIA, OPF and FLL airports.

## Now Under Construction

[inquire now](https://labaiabayharbor.com/contact/)

What schools are assigned to La Baia North?

The schools assigned to La Baia North include Nautilus Middle School, Ruth K. Broad Bay Harbor K-8 Center, and Miami Beach Senior High School.

La Baia North is in the 33154 neighborhood in Miami Beach, FL.
